title: Crispy Roast Chicken with Rustic Dutch Potatoes
description: A classic Chinese-inspired dish featuring a crispy roast chicken served with rustic Dutch potatoes.
instructions: Rinse the chicken and pat it dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix together the soy sauce, five-spice powder, and 1 tablespoon of the roast.
Rub the mixture all over the chicken, making sure it's evenly coated.
Heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of roast in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the chicken until it's golden brown on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and roast the chicken for 25-30 minutes, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
While the chicken is roasting, peel the potatoes and cut them into 1-inch wedges.
Toss the potatoes with the remaining 1 tablespoon of roast, salt, and black pepper on a baking sheet.
Roast the potatoes in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until they're crispy and golden brown.
Remove the chicken from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving with the roasted potatoes.
